items: Pay per click: you only pay when they click

Lower cost, ideal to generate demand

vsRoi.title: Real profitability example

features.title: Marketing strategy
features.text:
We analyze your business and decide whether to advertise on Google or Meta (Facebook/Instagram) based on your customer profile. On Google, people are actively searching for what you offer — you pay per click (e.g. 0.55€ per click) and only pay when someone clicks. On Meta, you pay for reach (impressions); people are browsing for entertainment and your ad can spark the desire to buy. Google is more expensive but the customer already has purchase intent. Meta is cheaper but the customer needs to be convinced.

 Real example: if your average ticket is 150€, we needed 95 clicks on Google to get 1 sale. Each click costs 0.55€, total investment 95 × 0.55€ = 52.25€. The sale was 150€. For every 1€ invested you get back 2.87€. That's a 287% ROI.

features.title: Customer targeting
features.text: We define who your ideal customer is: age, location, interests and behavior. This way your ads only show to people who can actually buy from you, without wasting money on people who will never hire you.

features.title: Market analysis
features.text: We study your area, your competition and how your current customers behave. This tells us whether to advertise on Google, Meta or both, and with what type of campaign.

features.title: Online advertising
features.text: We create and manage ads on Google and social media. We test different texts, images and audiences to keep what works best and avoid wasting budget.

features.title: WhatsApp Business auto setup
features.text: We set up WhatsApp Business with automatic replies: greetings, away messages and quick replies. We use the basic default options the app offers, no complications.

features.title: Lead capture forms
features.text: We add forms on your website and social media so interested customers can leave their details effortlessly. You receive organized information ready to use.

bottom.title: Want more clients without complexity?
bottom.desc: We help you build a lead capture system that attracts clients for you.

Perfect! I've booked your appointment for Thursday at 11:00. I sent the confirmation via WhatsApp and email.

FAQ.subtitle: We answer your questions so you can make decisions with confidence.

items.question: People already know me through word of mouth, why do I need this?
items.answer: Word of mouth is great, but it's unstable. If you only rely on that, you have no control over how many new clients come in each week. We create a lead capture system that works in parallel so you have a more constant flow and a professional online image.

items.question: I don't have time to learn new technologies or AI.
items.answer: That's exactly why we don't sell you technology, but time and control. We handle the technical part: website, automations and digital systems, so you only see the results without having to learn new tools.

items.question: My business is small, isn't this for larger companies?
items.answer: Quite the opposite. Small businesses benefit the most from automation. Every hour you save on responses, follow-up or repetitive tasks is an hour you can dedicate to better managing your business or reclaiming free time.

items.question: I already have a website or social media and they don't bring me clients.
items.answer: Having an online presence doesn't mean having a system that converts. We don't just design a pretty website: we create a basic lead capture strategy so the client goes from seeing you online to trusting you and hiring your service.

items.question: I've had bad experiences with marketing agencies before.
items.answer: We understand. Many agencies sell hype, technical jargon or metrics that don't translate into real results. At VM Agency we focus on a clear transformation: more professionalism, more trust and more real opportunities for your business.

items.question: Isn't it expensive to implement these systems?
items.answer: What's expensive is losing clients because you don't convey trust, don't respond on time or rely only on word of mouth. We don't frame it as a technology expense, but as an investment to professionalize your business, save time and stabilize your income.
